summary: Menu bar disk monitor shows remaining space with low-disk warnings, a detail popover, and separate launch-at-login control.
introduced: Menu bar icon shows remaining disk space as a color-coded percentage and bar (green, orange, or red when free space drops below twice your Mac’s memory)
Click the menu bar icon to open a drive summary with volume name, used percentage, total/used/free capacity, Open DiskWise, and Hide Menu Bar Monitor
New Settings → Startup toggle: Open DiskWise at login, independent of the menu bar monitor
changed: Turning on Show disk space in menu bar no longer registers DiskWise for login at startup or opens System Settings
Menu bar shows remaining space as a color-coded percentage only (no bar); refresh interval adapts to how much space is left
Hide Menu Bar Monitor in the popover turns off the View menu and Settings toggle
Launch prompt and setup instructions updated to describe remaining-space display instead of login-item approval
fixed: Removed v0.3.9 from the Sparkle update feed so clients stay on the supported 0.3.8 release line
